Career History

Professional Experience

Oct 2022 – Present
Oracle NetSuite
India GDC · 4 Countries
Consulting Portfolio Lead (Director-equivalent · P&L: $5M+)

Promoted from Senior PM within 36 months. P&L accountability for $5M+ total delivery portfolio across 51 concurrent engagements in USA, Canada, India, Philippines — 38 as named PM, 13 governed through 6 PMs. Leads 38-person GDC delivery organisation across 3 supervisory tiers.

Portfolio Scale & P&L Performance
  • Scaled total delivery portfolio from $100K to $5M+ in annual recognised revenue over 3.5 years — governing 51 concurrent client engagements across 4 countries as named PM and Portfolio Lead.
  • Generated $3.6M+ in annual billable delivery value at $250/hr across 1,200+ monthly hours — sustaining 110–130% utilisation overperformance.
  • Protected ~$460K in annual portfolio revenue by driving scope leakage from 30% to 10% through WBS governance, SOW boundary discipline, burn-down acknowledgement, and leadership visibility.
  • Engaged CFO, CEO, and VP-level client stakeholders and Oracle Director/VP leadership on portfolio risk, capacity strategy, and AI programme outcomes.
Delivery Transformation & Operational Excellence
  • Transformed JRA Score compliance from 75–76% to 96% sustained in 12–18 months, protecting team variable pay at direct financial risk.
  • Built Centre of Excellence reducing consultant onboarding from 4 weeks to 2 weeks across 300–400 practitioners — estimated $7M cumulative billing acceleration at $250/hr.
  • Reduced client escalations 20% through structured risk management, scope governance, proactive stakeholder communication, and early-warning dashboard visibility.
AI Innovation & Built Systems
  • Architected Claude API-based LLM compliance intelligence system for anomaly detection, forecast-vs-actuals, task-quality evaluation, KPI dashboards, and reporting compression from 37 hours to under 3 hours monthly.
  • Co-designed GPT-5 agentic global staffing platform supporting 1,000–1,500 resource decisions monthly across 4 countries.
  • Built AI-powered PM Web Tool with Gantt, WBS, Agile, RAID, EVM, budget tracking, and portfolio dashboards in a single offline HTML file.
  • Built Python ETL data pipeline ingesting SuiteProjects XML/CSV exports, computing KPI scores, and generating automated charts.

  • Managed 10–14 concurrent NetSuite implementation programmes across multiple industries and geographies.
  • Drove scope protection discipline reducing uncompensated work from 30% to 10% across the portfolio.

Work & Thought Leadership

Publications & Projects

Open-source tools, AI-powered systems, articles, and frameworks I have built and published.

GitHub
SignalDesk — AI-Powered Work Signal Assistant
Turn scattered work signals into meeting prep, follow-up drafts, action audits, and blocker alerts — before things slip. The assistant is the memory layer between your tools and your next individual action.
2025Live Demo ↗
GitHub
Offline IT Project Manager Workspace
A single-file, browser-based PM workspace for Fixed Bid / Waterfall, Agile Scrum / T&M, and Hybrid projects. Covers planning, execution, budget tracking, team visibility, reporting, and AI-style project prediction. Community-friendly, fully offline — no installation, no server, no database.
2025View on GitHub ↗
Tool
AI-Enabled Delivery Intelligence System
Built from v1 to v8.2+ — Python pipelines ingesting SuiteProjects data, 27+ auto-generated charts, compliance scoring, utilisation tracking, and AI-powered coaching cards. Compressed 4–6 hours of monthly manual reporting into minutes.
2024–2025Read on LinkedIn ↗
Article
Prompt Engineering Frameworks for Enterprise Delivery
Published practical AI prompt frameworks (R-T-F, S-O-L-V-E, T-A-G, R-A-C-E) for project managers and delivery leads. Demonstrates structured prompting applied to governance, reporting, and decision-support use cases.
2024View on LinkedIn ↗
Article
Waterfall vs Agile vs AI Build vs Vibe Coding
Reflective analysis on how software delivery has evolved — contrasting structured Waterfall, iterative Agile, AI-accelerated builds, and the risks of unstructured vibe coding. The real goal: not how fast you build, but how reliably you create value.
2025Read on LinkedIn ↗
